title: Colours.
content:
How bright is Earth's rich gown
     None but an Airman knows
    Yellow, and green, and brown - 
    How bright is Earth's rich gown!
     I see, as I gaze down,
     Its purple, cream, and rose.
    How bright is Earth's rich gown
     None but an Airman knows!
meaning:
Paul Bewsher's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Colours."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
